notes: SHIP v1.14.224 — OPS-CONTENT DEAD-TAP SWEEP (the second wrong-host dead-render class, after .223's wk-grid class). An audit of every hard-coded document.getElementById('ops-content') render host found a FAMILY of deploy/ops sub-tools that paint into the legacy #ops-content — which lives inside pg-sop (display:none under body.rd) — so they were dead 100% of the time under redesign (a 'No silent host fallbacks' hard-rule violation; same silent-success-into-hidden-node class, invisible to the .221 throw-only instrument). Each fix verified against live code for its CORRECT host (NOT blind-repointed — 3 of them render into sub-panes, not #wk-deploy). FIXES (6): (1) vendorEdp_open (Attach Vendor EDP) — repoint to deploy_opsHost() + deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible() drill-out + LOUD fail (was a silent `if(!c)return`). (2) manifest_switchTo (Manifest multi-deploy switcher chip) — redesign_isOn() ? #ops-tool-host : #ops-content (the manifest tool paints into #ops-tool-host via rd_openOpsTool; no drill-out — only reachable in-tool after the door already drilled out). (3) bomIngest_refresh (~30 BOM ingest actions) — #bom-tab-pane under rd (INGEST nests one level deeper than the tool host; targeting the pane preserves the INGEST/PROGRESS strip). (4) bomTab_setSubtab (INGEST/PROGRESS stab) — #ops-tool-host under rd (rebuilds the WHOLE tab = strip + pane, so must target the tool host, not the pane). (5) BD.openJob (Burndown job card) — deploy_opsHost() (#wk-deploy) + drill-out: #ops-tool-host is absent on the nav_restore job: and job-complete showOpsTab reach paths, so #wk-deploy is the one host present on every path; reachable via the nav_restore job: branch (excluded from .223's drill-out regex) so it needs its own drill-out. (6) AUDIT.openAudit (Audit card / createNew) — deploy_opsHost() + drill-out, same reasoning (createNew->showOpsTab('audits') and nav_restore audit: lack #ops-tool-host). SOP (openSopDetail): NOT repointed — SOPs are intentionally DEFERRED with no rd home (comment ~:25310; goOpsTab('sops') degrades to Work>Deploy under rd; the global-search SOP caller already gates identically at ~:43541). The leak was an UNGATED sibling setTimeout(openSopDetail) at ~:31092 (fires after goOpsTab's rd degrade) — GATED it under !redesign_isOn() so under rd only the degrade runs (matching the existing precedent); nav_restore sop: branch left as-is (now unreachable under rd after this gate; touching it would risk ?legacy=1). LEGACY INVARIANCE (all 6): under ?legacy=1 redesign_isOn() is false → items 1-6 resolve to #ops-content exactly as before; deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible() early-returns under legacy (no DOM touch); SOP setTimeout fires as today. Byte-identical-behavior. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks · CSS brace balance (no CSS change) · CRLF · three-stamp lockstep .223->.224 · all 6 host repoints present · deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible occurrence count. ROLLBACK: additive (host-ternary swaps + 3 drill-out calls + 1 setTimeout gate), git revert clean. DEVICE-VERIFY (batch, HARD STOP): CLEAN update to v1.14.224, then under the New UI: (1) open a deploy detail -> ATTACH VENDOR EDP (master-scoped) -> paste form now appears (was dead); (2) Manifest tool with 2+ deployments -> tap the deploy switcher chip -> manifest re-renders visibly; (3) BOM tool -> tap INGEST/PROGRESS + do an ingest action (paste/file/step) -> the tool updates visibly (was frozen); (4) Deploy detail -> BURNDOWN -> tap a job card -> job detail paints; (5) Deploy detail -> AUDITS -> tap/create an audit -> detail paints; (6) a Suggested SOP row in rack detail -> lands on Work>Deploy (degrade), NOT a dead tap; (7) ?legacy=1 -> all of the above unchanged (renders into #ops-content). NOTE: still owed in the batch (within the 6-cap): .220 3D parity + .221 instrument + .222 Forge Stage 1 + .223 deploy card (DEVICE-VERIFIED 2026-07-10). NEXT ships: Command Lens stat-card tap-throughs (RACKS->floor map / BLOCKERS->empty-safe / DEPLOYS->active list), then the version badge.
